banners.bannerClassName: mx-auto w-full max-w-3xl flex items-center justify-start text-center text-md my-12 p-0 border-2 border-[#eceff5] whitespace-nowrap leading-normal rounded-2xl text-[#3f525b] bg-white overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md focus:outline-none transition ease-in-out duration-150

banners.containerPath: .//form[contains(@class, "space-y-v1") and not(ancestor-or-self::*[@hidden or contains(concat(" ", normalize-space(@class), " "), " hidden ") or contains(translate(@style, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"), "display: none") or contains(translate(@style, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"), "display:none")])]

Cursor.jobTitlePath: .//h1[not(ancestor-or-self::*[@hidden or contains(concat(" ", normalize-space(@class), " "), " hidden ") or contains(translate(@style, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"), "display: none") or contains(translate(@style, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"), "display:none")])]
jobDescriptionPath: .//div[contains(@class, "prose") and not(ancestor-or-self::*[@hidden or contains(concat(" ", normalize-space(@class), " "), " hidden ") or contains(translate(@style, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"), "display: none") or contains(translate(@style, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"), "display:none")])]

.//main[contains(@class, "section--longform") and not(ancestor-or-self::*[@hidden or contains(concat(" ", normalize-space(@class), " "), " hidden ") or contains(translate(@style, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"), "display: none") or contains(translate(@style, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"), "display:none")])]//section[contains(@class, "container")]
Cursor.jobLocationPath: .//h1[not(ancestor-or-self::*[@hidden or contains(concat(" ", normalize-space(@class), " "), " hidden ") or contains(translate(@style, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"), "display: none") or contains(translate(@style, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"), "display:none")])]/following-sibling::p[1]

jobCompanyNamePath: substring-after(.//meta[(@name="description" or @name="og:description" or @name="og:title") and starts-with(@content, "Careers at ")]/@content, "Careers at ")

Lever.jobCompanyNamePath: substring(.//div[contains(@class, "main-footer-text")]/p/a[contains(., " Home Page")]/text(), 1, string-length(.//div[contains(@class, "main-footer-text")]/p/a[contains(., " Home Page")]/text()) - 10)

banners.bannerClassName: mx-auto w-full max-w-3xl flex items-center justify-start text-center text-md my-12 p-0 border-2 border-[#eceff5] whitespace-nowrap leading-normal rounded-2xl text-[#3f525b] bg-white overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md focus:outline-none transition ease-in-out duration-150

banners.containerPath: .//p[contains(@class, "bd-title") and (contains(., "Job Information") or contains(., "Qualifications") or contains(., "Responsibilities"))]/parent::*/parent::*

jobDescriptionPath: .//p[contains(@class, "bd-title") and (contains(., "Job Information") or contains(., "Qualifications") or contains(., "Responsibilities"))]/parent::*/parent::*/parent::*
